title: Shihai Shoujo Kubaru-chan
titleNative: 支配少女くばるちゃん
synopsis: After fierce bullying, Yuuto Kiba wanted to die. On the verge of committing suicide, his fate changes rapidly when a strange and funky beautiful girl, Kubaru, tells him, “Give me your life”. Make your life happy with love?! A slightly strange and psycho love drama.

title: Koroshi-ya wa Kyou mo BBA wo Korosenai
titleRomaji: Koroshi-ya wa Kyou mo BBA wo Korosenai
titleNative: 殺し屋は今日もBBAを殺せない
synonyms: Even Assasins Can't Kill BBA Today
synopsis: Makoto Nozawa is 77 years old, lives alone, and her favorite food is curry. She seems like an ordinary-looking little old lady. For some reason, she has been targeted by multiple assassins, but every time she turns the tables on the killers. This BBA is the strongest in history. An invincible old-lady. Note: Includes 5 extra chapters.

title: A.O.Z Re-Boot Gundam Inle: Kuro Usagi no Mita Yume
titleRomaji: A.O.Z Re-Boot Gundam Inle: Kuro Usagi no Mita Yume
titleNative: A.O.Z Re-Boot ガンダム・インレ-くろうさぎのみた夢
synonyms: Advance of Zeta Re-Boot: Gundam Inle - Black Rabbit Had a Dream
synopsis: A.O.Z Re-Boot Gundam Inle: Kuro Usagi no Muta Yume is set in U.C. 0091after the end of the First Neo Zeon War. Zeon Remnants had retreated to Mars, forming "ReZeon" under General Alicia Zabi. By absorbing the Titans remnants after the Gryps War, they strengthened their military strength. This story depicts the Titans comeback that began on Mars. Their dream--what does "the shining star again" mean? Look, with a bird's-eye view, at the memories of their battles spun in history. Note: The first chapter was pre-published on April 25, 2014 in Dengeki Hobby Magazine.

tags.name: Military
tags.description: Centered around the life and activities of military personnel.

chapterSourceTitle: Advance of Zeta Re-Boot: Gundam Inle - Black Rabbit Had a Dream

title: Arafou Kenja no Isekai Seikatsu Nikki
titleRomaji: Arafou Kenja no Isekai Seikatsu Nikki
titleNative: アラフォー賢者の異世界生活日記
synonyms: Around 40 Kenja no Isekai Seikatsu Nikki
synopsis: Satoshi Oosako is a 40-year-old unemployed man who becomes engrossed in the VR RPG "Sword and Sorcery" after being laid off from his job. In the game, he goes by the name Zeros Merlin and rises to become a top-ranked player. However, he suddenly dies in the middle of a long gaming session. To his surprise, Satoshi wakes up to find himself in a massive unfamiliar forest. He soon learns from the goddess of this world, who brought him here after his death, that he has been reincarnated with all of his in-game stats intact. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Raul and His Vampire Prince
titleNative: ラウルと吸血鬼
synopsis: As a young orphan, Raul was adopted and saved by the effeminate, eternally youthful vampire Rose. Since then, he's wanted nothing more than to help and protect his vampiric savior. His conviction—and training—has helped him grow into a strong, muscular young man. However, no matter how much Raul grows, Rose can't help seeing him as that little orphan boy… (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Moto Sekai 1-i no Sub Chara Ikusei Nikki: Hai Player, Isekai wo Kouryaku-chuu!
titleRomaji: Moto Sekai 1-i no Sub Chara Ikusei Nikki: Hai Player, Isekai wo Kouryaku-chuu!
titleNative: 元・世界1位のサブキャラ育成日記 ～廃プレイヤー、異世界を攻略中！～
synonyms: Moto Sekai Ichi'i Subchara Ikusei Nikki: Hai Player, Isekai wo Kouryakuchuu!
The Former Top 1's Sub-Character Training Diary: A Dedicated Player is Currently Conquering Another World!~
The Former World Number 1's Alt Character Training Diary
synopsis: The protagonist who was rarely ever at school during his middle school and high school days, is unemployed even as an adult. From morning till night, it was video games. For him who was ranked first worldwide, it was his life. One day, his character is suddenly hacked. The data was unrecoverable and there was nothing that could be done. Feeling great despair at having lost his rank that he had bet everything to achieve in a world that controlled his life, the protagonist attempts suicide. When he awakens, he finds himself inside the video game, no, it was a real world that resembled it. There, he notices that he has reincarnated into the the body of a sub character that he had created and bought premium benefits for long ago but had left neglected.

title: A Record of a Mortal's Journey to Immortality
titleEnglish: A Record of a Mortal's Journey to Immortality
titleNative: 凡人修仙传
synopsis: The village boy Han Li was born poor. To subsidize household expenses, he joins the Qixuanmen Sect. Because of his spiritual roots, he was accepted as a disciple by the mysterious Doctor Mo and started to practice "Changchun Gong" arts under his mentorship. Although his qualifications are mediocre, Han Li embarked on the dangerous road of immortal cultivation with his unyielding will and a mysterious vial picked up by accident.

title: Nami Uraraka ni, Meoto Biyori
titleNative: 波うららかに、めおと日和
synopsis: In the spring of the 11th year of the Showa era, 20-year-old Natsumi receives a marriage proposal to Takiaki Masashi, who works for the Imperial Navy. Suddenly, she is married to a Navy husband. Their (fairly) inexperienced in house matters, as well as in the affairs of men and women, begin their life as a couple in the highest degree of purity! When the sea breeze blows, I think of you. A story of a couple living in prewar Japan, spring, summer, fall, and winter, humble but gentle.

synopsis: Miyuki-san is an elegant young lady from Kyoto. But our relationship is complicated. Why? "My, you sure are good at flattery," she says. But were those words sincere? Or just for show? Though we care for each other, we keep talking past one another—a frustrating, bittersweet love story. (Source: Comic Growl)

In the guild, the two of them found out that they possessed unbelievably powerful magic. Thus the regular high school students transformed into the strongest cheats.

synopsis: Misato-san, a very beautiful office lady who is good at her job, and her boss—Konishikawa-san, a middle-aged man who spoils his subordinates. The gap between the seriousness and cuteness will make you faint in anxiety, and this office love comedy with a difference in age begins!

title: The Fragrant Flower Blooms With Dignity
titleRomaji: Kaoru Hana wa Rin to Saku
titleEnglish: The Fragrant Flower Blooms With Dignity
titleNative: 薫る花は凛と咲く
synonyms: Kaoru und Rin: So nah und doch so fern
Kaoru i Rin. Rozkwitając z tobą
The Fragrant Flower Blooms With Dignity - Kaoru & Rin
synopsis: This story takes place in a particular town with two infamous schools in constant dispute: Chidori High, a boys' school predominantly attended by low-class students with damning grades, and its neighbor Kikyo Girls' High, with most of its female students coming from wealthy and prestigious families. One day, high school second-year Rintaro Tsumugi, a fierce-looking but gentle-minded student at Chidori, is helping at his family's patisserie when he encounters a female customer by the name of Kaoruko Waguri. Rintaro enjoys his time with Kaoruko, as she doesn't judge him for his appearance, but this blissful peace is quickly disturbed when Rintaro makes the discovery that Kaoruko is actually a student at Kikyo. This revelation marks the beginning of the two's strenuous tale, as they fight against the limitations placed upon them by their schools and surroundings in an attempt to find their own path! (Source: K Manga)

tags.description: Prominently features characters or themes associated with the LGBTQ+ community, such as sexuality or gender identity.

tags.name: Femboy
tags.description: Features a boy who exhibits characteristics or behaviors considered in many cultures to be typical of girls.

tags.name: Suicide
tags.description: The act or an instance of taking or attempting to take one's own life voluntarily and intentionally.

tags.name: Love Triangle
tags.description: Centered around romantic feelings between more than two people. Includes all love polygons.

tags.name: Delinquents
tags.description: Features characters with a notorious image and attitude, sometimes referred to as "yankees".

tags.name: Crossdressing
tags.description: Prominently features a character dressing up as the opposite sex.

tags.name: Unrequited Love
tags.description: One or more characters are experiencing an unrequited love that may or may not be reciprocated.

tags.name: Asexual
tags.description: Features a character who isn't sexually attracted to people of any sex or gender.

tags.name: Estranged Family
tags.description: At least one family member of the MC intentionally distances themselves or a family distances themselves from a person related to the MC.

tags.name: Philosophy
tags.description: Relating or devoted to the study of the fundamental nature of knowledge, reality, and existence.

tags.name: Rehabilitation
tags.description: Prominently features the recovery of a character who became incapable of social life or work.

tags.name: Tragedy
tags.description: Centers around tragic events and unhappy endings.

tags.name: Twins
tags.description: Prominently features two or more siblings that were born at one birth.

tags.name: Rape

title: Zero no Majutsushi: S-Rank Yuusha Party wo Zenryoku de Support Shiteita noni Tsuihousareta Saikyou no Majutsushi wa Party Kyoufushou ni Natta node Zenryoku de Ohitori-sama Musou wo Hajimeru Koto ni Shimashita @COMIC
titleRomaji: Zero no Majutsushi: S-Rank Yuusha Party wo Zenryoku de Support Shiteita noni Tsuihousareta Saikyou no Majutsushi wa Party Kyoufushou ni Natta node Zenryoku de Ohitori-sama Musou wo Hajimeru Koto ni Shimashita @COMIC
titleNative: ゼロの魔術師～Sランク勇者パーティを全力でサポートしていたのに追放された最強の魔術師はパーティ恐怖症になったので全力でお一人様無双を始める事にしました～@COMIC
synonyms: Zero Magician: I Was Supporting the S-Rank Hero Party with All My Might. The Strongest Magician Who Was Exiled Developed a Fear of Parties. I Decided to Put All My Effort into Making Each Person Unique.
synopsis: Rude, a magician belonging to an S-rank party, is expelled from the group due to the selfish actions of the hero, Tran. Betrayed by his comrades and heartbroken, Rude abandons the town he had been staying in and sets out on a journey to the neighboring Roland Empire in search of a new home. While on his journey, he defeats a band of thieves attacking a slave caravan. Then, unexpectedly, a beast girl who should have been freed pleads, “Please... I want you to be my master!”...? The strongest mage, abandoned by his comrades, becomes unstoppable in his new home! The Ultimate Heroic Fantasy! (Source: TO Books, translated)
chapterSourceTitle: Zero no Majutsushi ~S-Rank Yuusha Party wo Zenryoku de Support Shiteita no ni Tsuihousareta Saikyou no Majutsushi wa Party Kyoufushou ni Natta no de Zenryoku de Ohitori-sama Musou wo Hajimeru Koto ni Shimashita~
